properties.title: Horváth P. András lett az MTVA átmeneti vezérigazgatója
properties.summary: Horváth feladata lesz három hét alatt teljesen átvilágítani az MTVA-t.

properties.title: Nem egyszerű napokon vannak túl a cukorbetegek, de lehet, hogy még csak ezután jön a neheze
properties.summary: A nyári hőhullámok nem pusztán kellemetlenséget okoznak a hétköznapokban, hanem komoly élettani terhelést is – különösen igaz ez a diabétesszel élők számára. A tartósan magas hőmérséklet fokozza a folyadék- és sóvesztést, megváltoztatja a szervezet hőháztartását, és közvetlen hatással van a vércukorszint stabilitására, a vérnyomásra, valamint a keringési rendszer működésére is.

properties.title: Kövesdi Veronika: Mészáros Lőrinc a tisztítótűzben töltött idő után a mennyország felhőhabjain jachtozgatva is ihat még Hell Ice Lattét?
properties.summary: A szent cél érdekében tényleg próbáltam felülemelkedni azon, hogy az országot kizsákmányolók felelősségre vonását mostantól Tisztítótűz műveletnek hívjuk.

properties.title: Tisza-kormány: Iskolatámogatás, akkugyári vizsgálat és személycserék jönnek a délutáni tájékoztatón
properties.summary: Számos személyi változás történt a magyar közéletben: Magyar Péter felmentette az NMHH elnökét, új vezetőt nevezett ki az Országos Kórházi Főigazgatóság élére, a pénzügyminiszter pedig leváltotta a Szerencsejáték Zrt. vezérigazgatóját, miközben a külügyben további nagyköveti visszahívások várhatók. Az Integritás Hatóság friss jelentése szerint a közbeszerzési rendszerben összeszokott cégek nyertek visszatérően, piaci ár-összehasonlítás hiányában az állam jellemzően túlárazott szolgáltatásokért fizetett. A harmadfokú hőségriasztást meghosszabbították, több településen vízhiány lépett fel, a kormány takarékos vízhasználatra kérte a lakosságot. A Medián legfrissebb felmérése szerint a Tisza Párt előnye tovább nőtt a Fidesz–KDNP-vel szemben, a biztos szavazók körében 73–21 százalékra, miköz

properties.title: Toată țara, sub cod portocaliu și galben de furtuni: sunt așteptate vijelii și grindină. ANM a emis și noi alerte de caniculă HARTĂ
properties.summary: Administrația Națională de Meteorologie (ANM) a emis joi o nouă atenționare cod galben de caniculă pentru cea mai mare parte a Moldovei și a Transilvaniei, dar și avertizări cod galben și cod portocaliu de instabilitate atmosferică pentru mai multe regiuni ale țării.

properties.title: Biblii, parfumuri, criptomonede și procese: Cum a făcut Donald Trump bani în primul an după revenirea la Casa Albă
properties.summary: Raportul financiar anual al președintelui american Donald Trump, publicat de Oficiul pentru Etică Guvernamentală al SUA, oferă o imagine detaliată asupra veniturilor și investițiilor sale din 2025. Documentul, care se întinde pe 927 de pagini, arată că Trump a câștigat bani din produse care îi poartă numele, tranzacții financiare, apariții în industria divertismentului și procese intentate unor companii media.

properties.title: Guvern: 107 milioane de lei pentru realizarea nodului rutier Peștera din Constanța
VIDEO Constanța: Circulație feroviară în pericol după ce hoții au tăiat cablurile de alimentare a macazurilor în stația CF Năvodari
Bolojan se întâlnește cu vicepremierul Republicii Moldova; va fi semnat un nou acord privind construcția podului peste Prut
Ofera CEC Bank pentru vacanță: asigurarea de călătorie, rovinieta, huvinieta, asistența rutieră, taxa de pod – toate pot fi plătite direct din CEC app
properties.summary: CEC Bank oferă clienților posibilitatea achiziționării direct din aplicația de Mobile Banking – CEC app a asigurărilor de călătorie precum și a serviciilor necesare pentru deplasările cu autoturismul: rovinieta, huvinieta, asistența rutieră și taxa de pod Fetești – Cernavodă.

properties.title: Autostrada Unirii A8: Azi se semnează contractul pentru lotul de la granița cu Republica Moldova
properties.summary: Compania Națională de Investiții Rutiere (CNIR) informează că astăzi va fi semnat contractul pentru proiectarea și execuția Tronsonului 4 DN24 Iași – Vama/Pod peste Prut Ungheni, cu asocierea  de companii italiene ITINERA - SAIPEM - ICM. Proiectul ultimului lot din A8 include și realizarea unui segment de autostradă cu o lungime de cinci kilometri în Republica Moldova.

properties.title: Transakčná daň rozpočet nezachráni. Len zalepí výpadok z nižších firemných daní. Čo ukázali prognózy vládnych analytikov
properties.summary: Ekonomika zostane medzi najslabšími vo V4.

properties.title: Na Kbelské začalo frézování. Doprava je svedena tunelem, obávané kolony se zatím nekonají
properties.summary: Na Kbelské ulici ve čtvrtek začala hlavní etapa rozsáhlé rekonstrukce. Doprava je nově vedena v režimu 1+1 jedním jižním pásem, zatímco na uzavřené části komunikace silničáři zahájili frézování vozovky. Přestože se před začátkem oprav očekávaly výrazné komplikace, během prvních hodin se dlouhé kolony netvořily.

properties.title: Zmasowany atak na Kijów. Są ofiary śmiertelne
properties.summary: Rosja przeprowadziła w nocy zmasowany atak na Ukrainę. Głównym celem był Kijów, w który uderzyły drony i rakiety balistyczne. Nie żyje co najmniej kilkanaście osób, a kilkadziesiąt jest rannych. Wołodymyr Zełenski poinformował o skutkach ataku na stolicę i inne obwody kraju. W związku z atakiem "prewencyjnie" poderwane zostały polskie myśliwce.

properties.title: Kur plauki, Klaipėda?
properties.summary: Dešimtmečiais augintas kaip tranzito centras tarp Rytų ir Vakarų, vienintelis jūrinis šalies uostas atsidūrė aklagatvyje, kuriame jo apyvartą palaiko tik vietos pramonė. Tolesnei plėtrai reikalinga ne tik kryptis, bet ir gera idėja. Be to, kaimynystė su miestu sunkiai balansuoja tarp sinergijos ir kolizijos.

properties.title: LSM valde un darbinieki apņemas meklēt kompromisu zīmolu jautājumā – pagaidām nākotne neskaidra
properties.summary: Kāds būs Latvijas Radio un Latvijas Televīzijas vēsturisko zīmolu turpmākais liktenis? Vai Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija (LSM) valde nepieciešamības gadījumā būs gatava atzīt kļūdu un uzņemties atbildību? Šie ir tikai pāris no daudziem jautājumiem, ko trešdien, 1. jūlijā, Sabiedriskā medija darbinieki uzdeva valdes priekšsēdētājai Baibai Zūzenai. Tikšanās notika pēc tam, kad daļa Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija darbinieku publiskā vēstulē aicināja saglabāt tautā iemīļotos nosaukumus Latvijas Televīzija un Latvijas Radio līdzās Latvijas Sabiedriskā medija – LSM – zīmolam.

properties.title: What Was Leaked After the Cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži? Cert.lv Explains
properties.summary:
So far, the attacker has leaked 44 gigabytes of data stolen during the cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), although the total volume of data potentially obtained is likely to be much larger, according to Latvia’s national cybersecurity incident response institution, Cert.lv. According to the institution, the leaked data mainly consists of internal documents, email […]

properties.title: Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia
properties.summary:
A Riga City Court has sentenced an electrician to five years and six months in prison for spying on behalf of Russia’s military intelligence agency (GRU). The court also imposed one year and eight months of probation supervision following his release, without confiscation of property, the LETA news agency has learned. According to the prosecution, […]

The post Electrician in Latvia sentenced to five and a half years in prison for spying for Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Rosļikovs, wanted by authorities, to run in Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections
properties.summary:
The leaders of the For Stability! party’s candidate lists for Latvia’s 15th Saeima elections will be Svetlana Čulkova, Pāvels Kuzmins, Natālija Marčenko-Jodko, Ludmila Rjazanova, and Igors Orlovs, according to the LETA news agency. Čulkova, who leads the dissolved For Stability! parliamentary group, will head the party’s list in the Riga constituency. Running second on the […]

properties.title: Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns
properties.summary:
The recent cyberattack on Latvijas valsts meži (LVM), in which a hacker managed to breach the company’s IT systems and gain control over data, demonstrates that Latvia’s strategic infrastructure remains relatively vulnerable to such attacks, Minister for Smart Administration and Regional Development Edgars Tavars said in an interview with TV3 on Friday. The minister called […]

The post Cyberattack on Latvia’s state forests company highlights national cybersecurity risks, minister warns appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia
properties.summary:
Some eastern parts of Latvia may see light rain on Friday, while light northerly winds will prevail across most of the country, according to the Latvian Environment, Geology and Meteorology Centre. Daytime temperatures will rise to 22–27°C, while areas along the Gulf of Riga coast will remain a few degrees cooler. Over the weekend and […]

The post Forecasters predict tropical nights and temperatures of up to thirty-five degrees in Latvia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings
properties.summary:
Most members of Riga City Council’s leadership saw their public approval ratings decline during the first half of this year, according to the latest survey conducted by research company SKDS on behalf of the Riga City Council. Only three politicians improved their popularity in May compared with November last year. The sharpest decline was recorded […]

The post Most Riga city council leaders see popularity decline as new poll reveals shifting ratings appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia
properties.summary:
Another oil depot has caught fire in Russia’s Krasnodar region following overnight Ukrainian drone strikes, according to Russian and Ukrainian media reports. The Ukrainian Telegram channel Exilenova+ reported that three fuel storage tanks caught fire at the oil depot in the village of Poltavskaya after the attack. According to the Telegram channel Astra, the Poltavskaya […]

The post Ukrainian drone strikes ignite another oil depot in Russia appeared first on Baltic News Network.

properties.title: Tallinn's taxi services now predominantly app-based
properties.summary: Taxi services in Tallinn are now offered predominantly through information technology platforms, with the market share of traditional taxi services around just 5 percent.

properties.title: Tallinn's population decreases as net migration turns negative
properties.summary: For the past five years, the number of births has been lower than the number of deaths in Tallinn. In addition, net migration has now also turned negative, meaning more people are leaving the capital than moving there.

properties.title: Court rejects MEP's campaign expenses challenge
properties.summary: Tallinn Administrative Court has dismissed European Parliament member Jaak Madison's appeal seeking to overturn an order by the Political Parties Financing Surveillance Committee requiring him to repay campaign expenses.

properties.title: Photos: Trolleybus services return to Tallinn
properties.summary: Trolleybuses have reappeared on the streets of Tallinn after a break of over a year and a half, with service restored on Wednesday.

properties.title: Minister: Police conducting raids near schools to catch e‑scooter offenders
properties.summary: Estonian police have conducted raids near schools in Tallinn suburbs to curb rising e-scooter accidents among 7–14-year-olds, the only demographic seeing increased injuries during the first five months of 2026.

properties.title: Tallinn's Pirita beach tests positive for blue-green algae
properties.summary: The Health Board detected both non-toxic and toxic species of blue-green algae in water samples taken Wednesday at the Pirita beach swimming area.

properties.title: Bombay kasiino ulatuslik koondamine jõudis kohtusse: töötaja väidab, et pärast vallandamist palgati samale tööle uued inimesed
properties.summary: Tallinna Bombay kasiino tegevusega seotud ettevõtte OÜ Heathmont ulatuslik kollektiivne koondamine jõudis kolmapäeval Harju Maakohtusse. Endine tarkvarainsener Armando Cifuentes Gonzalez nõuab kohtus tema koondamise õigusvastaseks tunnistamist ning kolme kuu keskmise töötasu suurust hüvitist.

properties.title: Kuninganna Camilla foto tuntud kirjanikuga tõi talle kaela paksu pahanduse
properties.summary: «Tundub, et suhtekorraldustiim ei teinud seekord just kõige paremat tööd,» kommenteeris keegi Briti kuninga ja kuninganna ametlikule Instagrami-kontole postitatud fotot, kus kuninganna Camilla seisab kõrvuti vastuolulise kirjanikuga.

properties.title: Kohus: Euroopa Parlamendi fraktsiooni makstud Jaak Madisoni kampaaniakulud olid keelatud annetus
properties.summary: Tallinna halduskohus jättis rahuldamata Jaak Madisoni (KE) kaebuse Erakondade Rahastamise Järelevalve Komisjoni (ERJK) ettekirjutuse peale, millega komisjon kohustas teda tagastama Euroopa Parlamendi valimiskampaaniaga seotud reklaami- ja üritusekulud. Kohtu hinnangul kujutas nende kulude katmine endast keelatud annetust.

properties.title: NÄDALA LEID ⟩ Mehel, kel nuga vööl, on ka noatupp uhkuse asi
properties.summary: Nädala leid on rubriik, kus Tartu linnamuuseumi arheoloogid tutvustavad Siuru väljakaevamistel keskpargis päevavalgele tulnud huvipakkuvamaid esemeid. Heal noal on vaja head tuppe. Rikkalike kaunistustega noatupp ongi seekordne jaaniaegne leid.

properties.title: Amserv avas Ott Tänaku hoones hiigelesinduse. Tänak: tugevad tulevad mõõnadest läbi
properties.summary: Amserv avas 1. juulil Tallinna lennujaama lähistel uue Toyota esinduskeskuse hoones, mille omanik on autoralli maailmameister Ott Tänak.
